entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for resistance to midge infestation

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: The insect pest Contarinia sorghicola (Stenodiplosis sorghicola) that infests sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO MIDGE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to withstand or resist infestation by sorghum midge

entities.name: GLUME LENGTH
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the sorghum glume associated with midge resistance

entities.name: GLUME HARDNESS
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the sorghum glume associated with midge resistance

entities.name: GLUME HAIRINESS
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the sorghum glume associated with midge resistance

entities.name: GRAIN CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Physical attributes of the grain associated with midge resistance

entities.name: MIDGE DAMAGE RATING
entities.description: A measure of the extent of damage caused by sorghum midge

entities.name: GENOTYPIC NON-PREFERENCE
entities.description: The tendency of midge females to avoid certain genotypes

entities.name: NO-CHOICE HEADCAGE TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A screening method used to evaluate midge resistance under uniform infestation

entities.name: GCA
entities.description: General Combining Ability used to evaluate the breeding value of parents

entities.name: SCA
entities.description: Specific Combining Ability used to evaluate the performance of specific hybrid combinations

entities.name: MID-PARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: A measure of dominance used to evaluate midge resistance

entities.name: NATURAL INFESTATION
entities.description: Exposure to midge pests under field conditions

entities.name: UNIFORM INFESTATION
entities.description: Controlled exposure to midge pests for screening

entities.name: GENE ACTION
entities.description: The way genes interact to produce a specific phenotype

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: A type of gene action where the effect of alleles adds up

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of a plant and its environment

entities.name: DOMINANCE
entities.description: The interaction between alleles at the same locus
